response.global_summary: A video featuring the Hololive English group 'Promise' (IRyS, Ouro Kronii, Hakos Baelz) performing a dance on a virtual stage, followed by spoken banter and a detailed presentation of their 2nd-anniversary merchandise. No vocal music was detected in the video; the audio consists of instrumental background music and spoken dialogue.

scenes.description: The Hololive English group 'Promise' performs a dance routine on a virtual, illuminated stage to instrumental EDM background music.
The characters engage in spoken banter on the stage, discussing their performance.
The characters present their 2nd-anniversary merchandise, including a frame art board, collection cards, ring necklaces, tumblers, and a 2-way tote bag, with on-screen text detailing the items.
The characters have a final conversation to conclude the announcement and end the segment.
